title: Ancient Lightning
description: Harness the power of ancient lightning, with new ways to explore, including new weapons, tools, and biomes.
body:
## **Harness Ancient lightning with this mod.**


# Biomes
There are mulitple new biomes for you to explore in this mod, with new exploration and fun.

![Overgrown Lily Grove](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d2de41a2d58d0af93c06bae75a0fc79ef827d58a.png)

### See more images in the gallery tab.

# Tools and Armor
Have fun with new tools and armor in this mod, allowing for easier exploration.

![Lightning Armor and Wand](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a40d484a23961b8032f0c08b2446e84697ecaf30_0.webp)

### See the gallery for more images and new tools and armor.

## Expect more to come as I update the mod!

Curseforge: [https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/ancient-lightning](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/ancient-lightning)
